sourceTitle: Guidelines for Use of AI at UF
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Don’t: assume AI detection tools are reliable proof of misconduct.
evidenceSnippetDisplay: The UF guidance lists as a “Don’t” that users should not assume AI detection tools are reliable proof of misconduct.
